svg.title: SABAODY — NOT ISLANDS, A MANGROVE NETWORK
svg.text: SABAODY — NOT ISLANDS, A MANGROVE NETWORK
System correction board • 79 numbered Yarukiman groves / bridges / bubbles / nested landmarks
numbered root nodes • bridge graph • bubble ecology
Reuse its palette and bubble material.
BLENDER RULE — build one root/trunk kit, then 79 addressable grove collections
The numbered node graph is mandatory; exact canonical grove placement remains a research layer.
